data.content: Shipment review APPROVED. Verified: (1) all commits live on main — merge 65c9f4f90a04, impl 78be211ba550, plus 5 prior iteration commits all tagged; (2) 2152 tests pass, contract test history-terminal-theme-contract passes; (3) lint clean on src/; (4) tsc/build errors are pre-existing stale work/ worktree pollution, not from this shipment — main src/ compiles cleanly; (5) changes correctly apply font-mono, subpixel-antialiased, 15px body text, leading-6/7, improved border/bg contrast matching terminal panel styling across agent-history-view.tsx, interaction-picker.tsx, terminal-panel.tsx; (6) no regressions detected.
